title: Fractions
summary: Fractions represent selected equal parts of a whole.
claim: Fractions represent quantities formed by dividing a whole into equal parts and selecting some number of those parts.

proof_layers.summary: Fractions represent selected equal parts of a whole.
proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: Dividing a whole into equal parts and selecting a subset produces a fractional relation.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: Dividing a whole into equal parts and selecting a subset produces a fractional relation.
proof_layers.empirical_or_reconstruction_basis: Reconstructable with simple objects, marks, measurement, or geometric construction depending on the truth.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
